POST.description: Triggers the deployment of the Cyoda environment

suggested_workflow.complete_code_for_action_derived_from_th:
async with aiohttp.ClientSession() as session:
    async with session.post(TEAMCITY_API_URL, json=build_params, headers=HEADERS) as response:
        if response.status == 200:
            build_data = await response.json()
            return jsonify({"build_id": build_data.get("id")}), 201
        else:
            return jsonify({"error": "Failed to trigger build"}), response.status
suggested_workflow.description: Initiates a TeamCity build process for the Cyoda environment.

GET.description: Get the status of a Cyoda environment deployment

suggested_workflow.description: Initiates a TeamCity build process for the user application.

POST.description: Cancels a queued user application deployment

suggested_workflow.description: Issues a request to cancel a queued TeamCity build for the user application.

GET.description: Get the status of a user application deployment
Fetches the status of a deployed Cyoda environment using the build ID.
Fetches the status of a deployed user application using the build ID.
